description: Product Description Air Wick Pure Reed Diffuser Cherry Blossom Air. Wick. Pure. Reed. Diffuser. Cherry. Blossom. No added water100% fragrance, neutralises odours. Lasts for up to 28 days Ingredients CONTAINS; 3-butoxypropan-2-Ol, Distillates (petroleum), hydrotreated light, 2-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, TETRAHYDROLINALOOL, PHENETHYL ALCOHOL, 2,4-DIMETHYL-3-CYCLOHEXENE CARBOXALDEHYDE, LINALYL ACETATE, 2,6-DIMETHYL-7-OCTEN-2-OL, CITRONELLOL, ISOPROPYLPHENYLBUTANAL, GAMMA-UNDECALACTONE, AMYL CINNAMAL, 3-(4-isobutyl-2-methylphenyl) propanal, ALLYL HEPTANOATE, 4-METHYL-3-DECEN-5-OL, alpha-iso-Methylionone, 2,6-Dimethyl-5-heptenal , ISOEUGENOL, Piperonal, delta-1-(2,6,6-Trimethyl3-cyclohexen-1-yl)-2-buten-1-one, Limonene Directions Place the Air Wick Reed Diffuser in a well-ventilated area. Ensure the product is placed on a stable surface to prevent accidental spillage. The diffuser will naturally release the fragrance over time. Safety Warning Read safety and precautionary text before use. Keep for future reference. Use only as directed. Notice: product contains parts that may pose a choking hazard. Use in well ventilated areas. Ensure the product is placed on a stable surface to prevent accidental spillage. Wipe surface in case of spillage. Wash hands in case of skin contact. Contains dl-citronellol, 2,4-dimethyl-3-cyclohexen-1-carboxaldehyde, isoeugenol, delta-1-(2,6,6-trimethy1-3-cyclohexen-1-yl)-2-buten-1-one. Causes serious eye irritation. Causes skin irritation. May cause an allergic skin reaction. Harmful to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Keep out of reach of children and pets. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. If swallowed: immediately call a doctor. If on skin: wash with soap and water. If skin irritation occurs: get medical advice/attention. If in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Contains alpha-amylcinnamaldehyde, 2-methyl-3- (p-isopropylphenyl) propionaldehyde, 4(3)-(4-methyl-3-pentenyl)-3-cyclohexen-carbaldehyde, alpha-iso methylionone and d-limonene. May produce an allergic reaction. People suffering from perfume sensitivity should be cautious when using this product. Air fresheners do not replace good hygiene practices. See more
